payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new for Sam from Goldman because mem_new is the current, non-superseded memory matching the query. mem_old was filtered out because it has been superseded, so it should not be presented as a current fact. Superseded memories may be retained for provenance or history, but they are excluded from normal recall results when a newer replacement exists.

entity_resolution.reason: The input asks for an explanation of recall behavior, not to store or update a durable memory.

details: Identified request as a debug/explanation intent.
Preserved supersession semantics: mem_new is current; mem_old is filtered because superseded.
